hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); cd "c:/Users/Lucas/Desktop/FIFA/escanteios" && git add -A 2>/dev/null; if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then FILE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // "projeto"' 2>/dev/null | xargs -I{} basename {} 2>/dev/null); STAT=$(git diff --cached --shortstat 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\n'); git commit -m "auto(${FILE:-projeto}): ${STAT:-atualizado}" && git push origin main; fi 2>/dev/null || true
